name: Strata Skin Sciences Inc. Regis
summary: Strata Skin Sciences, Inc. is a medical technology company focused on the development and commercialization of products for the treatment of dermatological conditions. The company markets and sells the XTRAC excimer laser and VTRAC lamp systems for the treatment of psoriasis, vitiligo, and other skin disorders, and is headquartered in Horsham, Pennsylvania. Strata Skin Sciences aims to provide effective and convenient solutions for dermatologists and their patients.
